---
name: Feature request
about: A new scorer, adapter, or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What you want to measure or do**
The reliability property or workflow you're trying to support.

**Why the current scorers don't cover it**

**Proposed approach**
If it's a new scorer: the definition, the scoring method (deterministic or judge),
the pass threshold, and how the interval is reported — see
[METHODOLOGY.md](../../METHODOLOGY.md). For a new scorer family or a rubric/threshold
change, please open the issue before building so we can agree on the definition.
